code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let t = string.trim(s)
    mut sum = 0
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(t)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(t, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          sum = sum + (b - 48)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
  when None
    println("digit_sum=0")
  end
end
